sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96928" key="stoixeiokra/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στοιχειο-κράτωρ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ς. θεοί</foreign> gods <sense id="n96928.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who presided over the elements</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:107:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
